codeReview.summary: Added comprehensive test coverage for OpenAI provider's vision + structured output combination. The implementation correctly combines multimodal content handling with structured output for all three providers. Vision content handling is orthogonal to structured output configuration, so the combination works naturally.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md already documents the vision handling differences between providers: OpenAI passes image_url directly, Ollama extracts base64 to images array, Google uses inlineData with mimeType. The architecture.md also documents this. No gaps found.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md lines describing 'Vision Support' section, architecture.md lines describing 'Provider-Specific Notes'

summary: The feature adds 7 new tests for OpenAI provider to validate VAL-PROVIDER-OPENAI-003. All three providers now have test coverage for vision + structured output combination: OpenAI (7 tests), Ollama (2 tests), Google (2 tests). Implementation verification confirms that vision content conversion and structured output configuration operate independently and compose correctly. The convertMessages implementation for each provider handles multimodal content while the structured output path adds response_format/format/responseMimeType independently. All 267 tests pass, typecheck is clean.
